title: Simplest Copper Gear
body:
# About

**Do you think it's unfair that copper can't be used to make armor and tools on old versions? I do!**

This mod adds a full copper gear with characteristics between stone (leather) and iron, correcting this injustice.

# FAQ

**Q:** Will you port Simplest Copper Gear to Fabric?\
**A:** No, we usually only use Neoforge

**Q:** Will you back-port Simplest Copper Gear to X version?\
**A:** No, we don't usually back-port
